tasks.name: Task 1: Add 5 new Commands variants and run_* handler functions to main.rs
tasks.notes: 5 new Commands variants (Files, FileHistory, Reconstruct, GitLog, Artifacts) with run_* handlers. file-history and reconstruct use direct DB only in v1 (daemon API shape mismatch). 3 new DaemonClient methods (files, git_operations, artifacts) added to daemon_client.rs. Module doc comment updated to reflect 14 subcommands.

tasks.name: Task 2: Add output formatters for artifact subcommands to output.rs
tasks.notes: 4 new output formatters: print_files_table, print_file_operations, print_git_operations, print_artifacts. Follow existing column-alignment patterns. Import of artifact_queries types added.

deviations.description: DaemonClient methods added to daemon_client.rs as part of Task 1 -- the plan listed only main.rs in the files_modified section but wiring up daemon routing required adding files(), git_operations(), artifacts() methods to DaemonClient. This was a critical missing piece that blocked daemon-routed CLI paths for the new subcommands.

file-history and reconstruct subcommands use direct DB only in v1 -- the daemon API does not expose a file-history-by-path endpoint (it uses file_id-based routes), and content reconstruction involves sequential replay better done locally. When daemon mode is detected, these subcommands fall back to init_db for direct database access.
